name: novelist-mcp
description: MCP server for resumable AI-assisted novel writing pipelines.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('node:fs').chmodSync('dist/src/cli.js', 0o755)"
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --json --cache /tmp/novelist-npm-cache | node scripts/pack-check.mjs -
